title: Kaya’s Mansion Draws the Crew In
description: On pages 3–6, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why did you tell them those weird things?!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: "It's that time again"....?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yup... After he said that, he left the shop

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Oh, so it was time to go to the mansion

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Manson? The place where the sick girl lives?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Why does he go there?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: To tell lies!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Isn't that a bad thing to do?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's not bad! Actually, it's great!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: NA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes!! it's very good!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Eeeh?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: A mansion outside the village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So, you want to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...Talk to usopp again?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Butler of the mansion CLAHADOR

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What's wrong with that? I want to talk to him

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No! How many times have I told you,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He's the biggest liar in the village! If you talk to him...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You might catch his bad influ- ence....!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Petty!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Manson's owner Kaya

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yes, call me whatever you want,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But I'm not changing my mind

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: USOPPP's weird stories are just too exciting

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: To a weak young Ojousama like you,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But I'm feeling okay!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Please listen to me... when your parents passed away, they see- critically instructed me...

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: that I must protect Kaya- Ojousama...

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
